PR surface: Config -6. Total -6 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. On current main, `python3 -m json.tool qa/convex-credential-broker/convex/tsconfig.json` fails at the opening block comment, and the fetched PR-head file parses successfully with the same strict parser.

target.title: fix: keep Convex tsconfig valid JSON
target.body:
## Summary
- Removes comments/trailing prose from the Convex credential broker tsconfig so it remains valid JSON for strict parsers.
- Keeps the fork-main fix available while opening this clean upstream review branch.

## Verification
- `python3 -m json.tool qa/convex-credential-broker/convex/tsconfig.json >/dev/null`
- `git diff --check`

## Fork Context
This is split from `LDMB123/openclaw` fork `main`, which keeps accepted fork fixes rebased on top of upstream `main`. This PR branch contains only the Convex tsconfig JSON fix for upstream review.
target.author: ldmb123
